hypothesis: A two-stage multi-fidelity agent that generates candidates with an LLM-guided generative model, pre-screens thousands with an MLIP surrogate, and uses Bayesian optimization to select a small batch for DFT evaluation will identify at least 50% more novel thermodynamically stable compounds per DFT query than a MatterGen+diversity baseline across held-out ternary and quaternary chemical systems under the same DFT query budget.
